authority: This packet is an owner handoff only. It does not authorize Phase 2, demo trading, broker execution, live capital, or any paper-mode implementation.

owner_actions_now.action: After VPS is provisioned, run scripts/capture_phase2_vps_latency_evidence.ps1 from the Phase 1 root.
After VPS setup, capture NTP, backup, recovery-login, MT5 path, compile, startup, decision, and health evidence.
Sign PHASE2_OWNER_APPROVAL.md only after all objective gates are PASS.

owner_checklist.title: Keep local evidence collectors running
owner_checklist.detail: Do not stop the Phase 1 dry-run terminal or passive spread logger while wait gates mature.

owner_checklist.title: Select VPS provider, region, and plan
owner_checklist.detail: Fill the decision record in docs/PHASE2_VPS_SELECTION_MATRIX.md with provider, region, plan, backup, recovery, monitoring, and owner acceptance.

owner_checklist.title: Capture VPS latency evidence
owner_checklist.detail: Run scripts/capture_phase2_vps_latency_evidence.ps1 from the Phase 1 root after the VPS is provisioned.

owner_checklist.title: Fill first-day VPS verification evidence
owner_checklist.detail: Copy docs/templates/vps_*.template.txt into outputs/reports, fill verified keys, then regenerate PHASE2_VPS_FIRST_DAY_VERIFICATION.md.

owner_checklist.title: Review objective Phase 2 readiness
owner_checklist.detail: Use outputs/reports/PHASE2_READINESS_REPORT.md as the sole readiness authority.

owner_checklist.title: Sign owner approval only after all objective gates pass
owner_checklist.detail: Create C:\Users\ZHAO ZHU INFORMATION\Downloads\algo-trading-system\xau-usd\xauusd-phase1\outputs\reports\PHASE2_OWNER_APPROVAL.md only after readiness is PASS.

commands.copy_vps_evidence_templates:
Copy-Item docs\templates\vps_ntp_sync.template.txt outputs\reports\vps_ntp_sync.txt
Copy-Item docs\templates\vps_backup_config.template.txt outputs\reports\vps_backup_config.txt
Copy-Item docs\templates\vps_rdp_recovery.template.txt outputs\reports\vps_rdp_recovery.txt
